cause_analysis.narrative: OYESPA Aveda Lifestyle Salon & Spa churned on 2026-03-06 after 62 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-03-06 (email) — first complaint keyword: "issue". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-03-06 via email. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.

Subject: Hitesh, Your Payment is Due in 2 Days!\n\nBody: 96 Upcoming Payment Hope you are doing well! This is a quick heads-up that Zoca subscription for OYESPA Aveda Lifestyle Salon & Spa is due in 2 days. We just wanted to make sure everything goes through smoothly so your service continues without interruption. Rene…

Hello, or as we say away. It's a beautiful day at Away Spa and Away Vita Cafe. For store hours and location, press 1. For salon and spa services, press 2. For cafe, press 3. For group bookings, press 4. For billing, press 5. For experience feedback, press 6. To repeat these options press the star key.

Hi Hitesh, we understand you  have expressed your decision to discontinue. Your account manager will be reaching out to you shortly to assist with the process. We are closing this ticket for now. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you need anything.
Request Closed
